title: hieracium murorum subsp. epimedium
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. epimedium, also known as False Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium murorum subsp. epimedium is often used as a tincture or tea, and may also be combined with other herbs in formulas to enhance its medicinal properties.
